newCases.title: moveFromSavedForLater Returns Configurable Item with Preserved configurationItems
Edit Configurable Item by Remove+Add Preserves New Configuration
Identical Configurable Items Added Twice Produce Distinct Line Items

phase5.rootCauseHypothesis: A3 and A4 are state-dependent: they manifest only when SFL has pre-existing entries that collide with the moved line via the cart-projection async settle. On clean baseline (PRE:RESET_CART + clean SFL), per-line lineItemIds semantics work correctly and config preservation holds end-to-end.

newBugsToFile.summary: Cart-sidebar SFL miniwidget binds product.price.list ($16 master) instead of lineItem.listPrice ($33 configured)
savedForLaterLineItem / wishlistLineItemFields GraphQL fragments omit configurationItems — UI falls back to master-variation properties

investigationTicket.title: Contaminated-SFL state defect class — A3/A4 reproducibility on dirty state
investigationTicket.summary: Backend probe needed: selectedForCheckout semantics may override lineItemIds filter when cart projection rebuilds from contaminated state. Clean-baseline PASS but state-dependent FAIL was reproduced in 2026-05-19 chrome session.

new.rule: SFL miniwidget MUST bind lineItem.listPrice, not master product.price.list
new.source: frontend-execution-report.md Case 1; Anomaly A1; Phase 5 Scenario C VERIFIED-FAIL

new.rule: getSavedForLater GraphQL query MUST include configurationItems in LineItemType selection
new.source: frontend-execution-report.md Case 4; case4-wishlist-after-save-39.json; Phase 5 Scenario C VERIFIED-FAIL

new.rule: moveToSavedForLater / moveFromSavedForLater MUST honor lineItemIds payload selectively (not bulk-all)
new.note: Phase 5 Scenario D VERIFIED-PASS on clean baseline — invariant may need to be reframed as state-conditional or scoped to the contaminated-SFL bug investigation outcome

new.rule: Cart-projection async settle MUST NOT overwrite configurationItems set by the synchronous mutation response
new.note: Phase 5 Scenario B VERIFIED-PASS on clean baseline — invariant still valid in principle but the observed regression was state-dependent; recommend the contaminated-SFL investigation ticket inform the final wording

stale.observation: Exception clause language ambiguous re: configurable products vs variants
stale.suggestedAction: Add sub-bullet: 'Configurable products (those where addItem includes configurationSections) ALWAYS produce a new line item regardless of configuration identity.'
stale.source: VCST-4205 CASE6 author-side mismatch evidence; CRL-GQL-103 codifies the observed behavior

shouldFix: File new child bug for A1 (cart-sidebar miniwidget price binding)
File new child bug for A2 (SFL fragments missing configurationItems)
File investigation ticket for contaminated-SFL state-dependent defect class (covers A3/A4 in dirty state)
Run /qa-regression catalog,configurable-products,cart once new cases land

vcst4205_disposition: DO_NOT_REOPEN — PR #118 is working per Phase 5 clean-baseline retry. Transition VCST-4205 to Done after the 2 new child bugs are filed.
